title: IMD projects May 26 onset of monsoon over Kerala - MSN
article_text:
Early onset forecast: The southwest monsoon is expected over Kerala on May 26, nearly a week ahead of the usual June 1 date, with a ±4-day margin.
Seasonal rainfall warning: IMD anticipates below-normal rainfall this year at around 92% of the long-period average, with El Niño as a potential factor.
Critical for farming: The monsoon’s arrival supports sowing of rain-fed crops, replenishes reservoirs, and eases severe summer heat.
